deliverables.description: Read-only founder scan system status script with human-readable and JSON output modes

tests_run.notes: Help text displays correctly with all three flags (--base-url, --json, --timeout)

notes_for_orchestrator: Script uses stdlib-only (urllib) matching set_employer_password.py style
Human-readable output includes approximate ET timestamp (EST/EDT based on month, since no pytz)
IDs shortened to 10 chars + '...' for table readability
Time durations formatted as seconds/minutes/hours intelligently
Table columns match spec exactly: employer_id, scan_id, lead_id, status, created_at, started_at, time_since_created_seconds, time_since_started_seconds
Did NOT call real API as instructed - only tested --help and syntax
